title: Front Office Manager - Cox & Kings India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Cox & Kings India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Cox & Kings India in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cox & Kings India:
Cox & Kings India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cox & Kings India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
